title: Physics — 1D Kinematics
description: Constant-acceleration equations and a short problem flowchart.

blocks.title: Displacement
blocks.latex: x = x_0 + v_0 t + \tfrac{1}{2} a t^2

blocks.title: Variables
blocks.markdown:
| Symbol | Meaning |
|--------|--------|
| x, x_0 | Position, initial |
| v, v_0 | Velocity, initial |
| a | Acceleration |
| t | Time |

blocks.title: Problem approach
blocks.mermaid:
flowchart TD
  A[List knowns] --> B[Pick equation]
  B --> C[Solve algebraically]
  C --> D[Check units / sign]
